mods.name: Fate Kaleid - Miyu Edelfelt
mods.description:
Commissioned by **AK107bis**.

## Details

- **Location:** Winterhold Inn (The Frozen Hearth)

## Racial Powers

Unique racial abilities including a passive magicka improvement and her Noble Phantasm **Wish Upon a Star**. On activation (30 seconds):

- Gain 250 Health
- Gain 25 HP/s regen
- Receive 50% less damage from both physical and magical sources
- 50% reduced healing during the effect

## Credits

Screenshots by **Blacklist Actual**

downloads.name: Follower Download
downloads.description: Main mod package with race and follower. Access via Patreon.

mods.name: Hyperdimension Neptunia - Nepgear
mods.description:
**Nepgear Race + Follower & Follower voice EN**

> If the character is silent and there is no option to recruit when using custom voice, save and reload the game.

Commissioned by **Moshiki**.

## Details

- **Location:** Riverwood Sleeping Giant Inn
- **Combat style:** Spellsword

## Features

- Fully voiced follower
- Different responses based on her current HP
- Hairpin and necklace accessories
- Beam Saber weapon (stats the same as Glass Sword)
- With the follower voice: Nepgear can heal you if you fall under 50% HP, once every 60 seconds
- ESL-tagged

## Racial Power

She still uses **Berserker Rage** (Orc's power). May be updated in the future.

## Healing in action

See the last slide in the gallery.

## Credits

Pics (except the first one) taken by **Blacklist Actual**.
